documents.title: FOMC Statement - March 18, 2026
documents.text: The Committee decided to maintain the target range for the federal funds rate at 3.5 to 3.75 percent. Inflation remains somewhat elevated. The Committee will carefully assess incoming data.

documents.title: Implementation Note - March 18, 2026
documents.text: The Board of Governors voted to maintain the interest rate paid on reserve balances at 3.65 percent, effective March 19, 2026.

documents.title: FOMC Statement - June 17, 2026
documents.text: The Committee decided to maintain the target range for the federal funds rate at 3.5 to 3.75 percent.
